tools.name: get_available_cities
tools.description:
Get list of available cities for property search

Returns:
    Dictionary containing:
    - cities: List of available city names
    - total: Total number of cities

tools.name: get_available_amenities
tools.description:
Get list of available amenities for property filtering

Returns:
    Dictionary containing:
    - amenities: List of amenity objects with id and name
    - amenities_by_id: Dictionary mapping amenity IDs to names
    - total: Total number of amenities
